headline: Fastenal Company Announces Cash Dividend and Share Repurchase Activity
summary: WINONA, Minn., April 10, 2026--Fastenal Company (Nasdaq:FAST) ('Fastenal,' 'we,' 'our,' or 'us') reported its board of directors declared a dividend of $0.24 per share to be paid in cash on May 26, 2026 to shareholders of record at the close of business on April 28, 2026. Except for share and per share information, dollar amounts are stated in millions.

headline: Fastenal Earnings Due With S&P 500 Stock In Buy Zone
summary: Fastenal prepares to reports earnings for the first quarter early Monday.  On Friday, Fastenal stock rose in a buy zone after breaking out amid the broader Iran war ceasefire rally.  For the full year, the S&P 500 company, a supplier of fasteners, nuts, screws and bolts, is expected to achieve 10.6% sales growth vs. the low single digits just two years ago.

headline: Fastenal Q1 Earnings Results Ahead: What Investors Need to Know
summary: FAST is set to report Q1 2026 results on April 13, with EPS seen up 15.4% and revenue at $2.2B as contract strength meets margin pressure.
